---
name: Feature request
title: ''
description: Suggest a feature for the extracurricular activities system
body:
  - type: textarea
    id: summary
    attributes:
      label: Summary
      description: Describe the feature request.
    validations:
      required: true
  - type: textarea
    id: acceptance
    attributes:
      label: Acceptance Criteria
      description: List what should be delivered.
    validations:
      required: true
---
